ShortDescription.Value: Show/Hide notification alert icons, add/remove Money, set Milestones, Better Money Tooltip bottom menu.

Publish.LongDescription:
- Instant on/off toggle for all city alert icons. - Great for reducing visual stress or just a cleaner UI. - Modeled on the original City Controller mod. - Many new features and future plans.
### Features
- Show or hide notification alert icons. - Open the notification panel from the top-left button or hotkey. - Start with a custom Milestone. Trains now! Yes you can!.
#### Money tools - Quick handy info: hover over bottom menu money/population tooltips for instant info chart (faster than opening Info view). - Manual: add/subtract money on the fly with hotkeys ([ or ]). - Optional automatic money refiller. Manual is still recommended. - Convert saves from Unlimited Money type to normal Limited Money.
Hotkeys - Shift+N = open/close panel (same as clicking on Top Left icon). - N = toggle all notification icons on/off (same as clicking on Toggle All * star button) - [ = Add Money - ] = Subtract Money - Hold the money hotkey to repeat instead of clicking many times.
### Important Notes - Check **Show Instructions** on the About tab. - City Watchdog hides/shows alert icons and does not fix the underlying problem; get a break until you are ready to fix it. - Unlimited Money save: make a backup before converting the save. Mod cannot undo that conversion. - This is heavily rewritten and explansion of City Controller, nearly a whole rewrite. - CWD's Money View is a ground-up code write of similar money info to Show Text Trends (retired). Money viewer uses new designed methods to do customizable money layouts, settings options, and adds translations. - Install Achievement Fixer mod if you want Achievements while using mods, it was removed from this mod.
I hope you enjoy the new features, better performance, and safety checks!
### Support and feedback Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. If you like effort put into free mods, give a Like :)
### Future - 15 languages supported now, more in the future. - If anyone can make better thumbnail or screenshots, please let me know.
### Credits - River Mochi - author/maintainer - Thanks to Mbyron26 for orig. City Controller mod (retired). - Money View inspired by earlier mods by DanielNZ Show Text. - Dorkington - tester/feature suggestion - Flightech, SonNathan - testers - UnMaestro - German translation editing - Thumbnail photograph by Maryia Shedava at Mont Saint-Michel in Normandy, France: https://unsplash.com/photos/a-dog-poses-in-front-of-a-distant-castle-bEpjaU_CTcM
tags: Visual, UI organize icons
Publish.ChangeLog: - added Turkish, Vietnamese, Thai, European Portuguese translations
